How to print your documents

Follow these steps to print your Excel duty roster or Word forms correctly:

  1. Step 1. Download your file from the app
  2. Step 2. Open your Downloads folder and double-click the file to open it
  3. Step 3. In Excel, click the File menu
  4. Step 4. In the File menu, click Print
  5. Step 5. In Print settings, click No Scaling
  6. Step 6. In the dropdown, select Fit Sheet on One Page
  7. Step 7. Click Print
Have a suggestion or want to report a problem? Send feedback
Set Up a New EC Profile
Step 1 of 4
1  EC Details
2  Upload PDF
3  Columns & Rules
4  Review & Submit

Enter the details for your Emergency Centre. Once submitted, an administrator will review and approve the profile before it appears in the EC selector.

Choose "Consultant" if your EC uses the monthly consultant on-call PDF roster.
Fine-tune after seeing your PDF in Step 2.

Upload one page of your consultant on-call roster PDF. We'll render it so you can visually set column boundaries in the next step.

data starts ↓  y=188
⇧ Drag the red line to where your data rows begin (below the header).

Drag the blue vertical lines on the PDF preview to match the column boundaries in your roster. Then fill in the time rules below.

Time Rules

Enter times in HH:MM format (24h). These are the shift start/end times for each situation. Pre-filled with typical VHW consultant values.

SituationNormal FromNormal ToOT1 FromOT1 ToOT2 FromOT2 To
Weekday — Slot 1 + On-call
Weekday — Slot 1 only
Weekday — Slot 2 or 3
Weekday — On-call only
Weekend / Public Holiday

Review the profile JSON below, then submit for admin approval. Your EC will appear in the selector once approved.
